name: Dump-it Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Pie filling (any flavor you prefer)
1 medium-sized can Pineapple chunks with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the pie filling into a 9-inch square baking pan.
2. Spread the pie filling evenly over the bottom of the pan.
3. Pour in the crushed pineapple and its juice, spreading it evenly on top.
4. Sprinkle the yellow cake mix evenly over the mixture.
5. Melt the margarine and drizzle it evenly over all ingredients.
6. Sprinkle the coconut flakes (and nuts, if using) on top.
7. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour.
8. Carefully flip the pan onto a serving plate or serve directly from the pan using a spatula.
Your kids will love this one!
